text: Inside this luminous, futuristic space, the repetition of "23" echoes in my mind like an enigmatic mantra. The geometric design and fluorescent purples of the room awaken a sense of curiosity and slight alienation. I feel the gentle hum of electricity and the silent gaze of invisible observers. I am both watched and watching, suspended in an atmosphere charged with the promise of discovery and the quiet mystery of research. Here, I confront the edges of knowledge, unsure whether I am the experiment or the beholder.
